title: Cinar's Utilities
description: A client-side fabric mod that provides useful quality of life features for minecraft such as minimap, fullbright and zoom.
body:
Cinar's Utilities is a lightweight client-sided mod that provides client side quality of life utilities such as player minimap, fullbright, field of view zoom, etc. more features will be added in later updates.

![FullBright Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa391e9ff8d11177e666bfa992514901a3a518b6_0.webp)

Keybinds:

[**M**] -> Displays the mod configuration menu. (Work In Progress)

[**Z**] -> Zoom

[**G**] -> FullBright

[**N**] -> toggle names on minimap
